title: D7 Visa - Passive Income / Retirement Visa
summary: The D7 visa is designed for retirees and individuals with passive income (pensions, investments, rental income). It allows long-term residence in Portugal and is the pathway to the NHR tax regime and eventually Portuguese citizenship.
steps: Open a Portuguese bank account (Conta bancária) - can be done remotely
Obtain a Portuguese NIF (Número de Identificação Fiscal) tax number
Secure accommodation (rental contract or property purchase)
Apply for D7 visa at Portuguese consulate in home country
Travel to Portugal within visa validity period
Register with SEF (now AIMA) for residence permit
Apply for NHR (Non-Habitual Resident) status at Autoridade Tributária
documents: Proof of passive income: pension statements, investment statements, rental income
Proof of accommodation in Portugal (rental contract or property deed)
Criminal record certificate from home country
Health insurance valid in Portugal and EU
office: AIMA (Agência para a Integração, Migrações e Asilo) - formerly SEF
fee: €90 for visa application + €72.50 for residence card
notes: Minimum income requirement is approximately €760/month (1x Portuguese minimum wage). NHR status provides 10 years of tax benefits but excludes Portuguese-sourced income. You must spend at least 183 days per year in Portugal to maintain residence.
